title: athyrium × mentiens
intro: Athyrium × mentiens, also known as the Lady-in-Lake fern, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the autumn fern (Athyrium filix-femina) and the lady fern (Athyrium filix-femina var. angulatum). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Athyrium × mentiens include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Athyrium × mentiens can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
